Find a Lender to 
Get Pre-Approved

We have thousands of participating lenders who can help you get pre-approved for a mortgage. 
Quickly find one near you.
Use the zip code where you're home shopping.

All participating lenders are paid advertisers of Zillow Group Mortgages, Inc. Zillow Group Mortgages, Inc. Does not recommend or endorse any lender. We display lenders based on their location customer reviews, and other data based on information supplied by users. Payment by us does not affect how frequently they are displayed. For more information on our advertising practices, see our Terms of Use & Privacy. Zillow Group Mortgages, Inc. is a licensed mortgage broker, NMLS ID #1303160. For a current list of state licenses and disclosures, please see  Licenses and Disclosures .
